title: Good Night!
description: Makes sleeping better with the Refreshed effect!
body:
Good Night finally makes it so that sleeping in Minecraft does more than just change the day/night cycle. Before, sleeping simply changed the time of day. If you were injured, or dying, you would be in trouble. This is no longer the case!
- Now sleeping grants you the Refreshed Effect. 
- The Refreshed Effect makes you slighly faster, stronger, and healthier.
- And now finally you'll heal up when you sleep, meaning when you wake up, you can tackle those monsters at your door easier than ever before!
